evals.prompt: /m_code_init_project Create a minimal TypeScript API and make it ready for Claude-assisted development.
evals.expected_output: Creates minimal architecture boundaries, CLAUDE.md, validation commands, docs, and first behavior-focused tests.
assertions: Includes commands run or skipped with reasons.
Defines seams for external or nondeterministic dependencies.

evals.prompt: /m_code_init_project Harden this existing Python repo for AI coding without replacing existing conventions.
evals.expected_output: Reads existing conventions, preserves them, adds missing AI-ready docs/checks, and reports conflicts.
